one_line_thesis: Pure Cycle combines exclusive Denver-area water service rights with a phased Sky Ranch land business and a nascent rental portfolio.

deep_dive.executive_summary:
Pure Cycle combines exclusive Denver-area water service rights with a phased Sky Ranch land business and a nascent rental portfolio. FY2025 net income was $13.1 million on $26.1 million of revenue; H1 FY2026 accelerated lot revenue after a mild winter. At $10.09 per share the stock trades above GAAP book with a modest earnings yield.

We expect about 9.8% per year over seven years (total synthesis) on normalized owner cash of $0.50 per share, with Sky Ranch and tap-fee growth in the base case. The Lawrence owner-cash path before qualitative adjustment is slightly lower. Dhando is partial (r...

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: Predictable cash-flow security
applicability_tests: Incremental capital can be tied to identifiable projects, cohorts, or contracted capacity.
Returns on new capital can be separated from returns on the installed base.
Contract duration, volume protection, pricing, and counterparty risk are observable.
Leverage and future owner-funded capital are explicitly deducted.
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: A complete security value is intentionally withheld while material components are unpriced. Attribution restarts after the first proof-complete baseline.

properties.source: Pure Cycle 10-K FY2025; 10-Q Feb 28, 2026; nav_overlay as_of 2026-06-03

properties.name: Sky Ranch undeveloped phases + water/wastewater systems
properties.valuation_basis: Investment in water and wastewater systems net $71.3M; lot delivery economics embedded in segment growth — high is illustrative only
flags: High FV illustrative — not a filing mark
Segment sky_ranch_undeveloped is embedded_in_segment with $0 separate NAV

properties.name: Arkansas River Valley mineral interests (~13,900 acres)
properties.valuation_basis: Impaired to zero in FY2020; nav_overlay floor $0.50/sh × 24,103,908 shares

properties.name: Sky Ranch CAB / Rangeview reimbursable advances
properties.valuation_basis: Related-party notes receivable $56.3M; base uses $1.50/sh partial mark from nav_overlay

Pure Cycle combines exclusive Denver-area water service rights with a phased Sky Ranch land business and a nascent rental portfolio. FY2025 net income was $13.1 million on $26.1 million of revenue; H1 FY2026 accelerated lot revenue after a mild winter. At $10.09 per share the stock trades above GAAP book with a modest
We expect **9.78%** per year over 7 years at **~$10.09** on **$0.5/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Failure to recover Sky Ranch CAB and Rangeview advances on expected timelines, forcing equity issuance or development slowdown.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Failure to recover Sky Ranch CAB and Rangeview advances on expected timelines, forcing equity issuance or development slowdown.
Housing affordability and buyer confidence could reduce builder lot take-down pace.
Water Court denial or delay on remaining Box Elder / reservoir claims (1,635 AF application denied February 2025; settlement added water December 2025 per press release).
